subcodes.first_line: O 'Inayatu'llah! Render praise unto Him Who is the Desired One of all creation, that He hath called thee forth from the unseen realm in His days [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا عنایه الله علیک بهائی حمد کن مقصود عالم را که ترا در ایامش از عالم غیب
subcodes.subjects: @permission for visit; pilgrimage, @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day, @poems and quotation from poetry, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @praise and encouragement
